member.name: T:GameFramework.Configuration.GameLevel
member.summary: Represents the difficulty level of the game.

member.name: F:GameFramework.Configuration.GameLevel.Beginner
member.summary: Easy difficulty – suitable for beginners.

member.name: F:GameFramework.Configuration.GameLevel.Normal
member.summary: Normal difficulty.

member.name: F:GameFramework.Configuration.GameLevel.Expert
member.summary: Hard difficulty for experienced players.

member.name: T:GameFramework.Configuration.GameConfig
member.summary:
Reads and stores game configuration from an XML file.
Expected XML format:
<GameConfig> <World MaxX="20" MaxY="20" /> <Level>Normal</Level> </GameConfig>

member.name: P:GameFramework.Configuration.GameConfig.MaxX
member.summary: Gets the maximum X dimension of the world.

member.name: P:GameFramework.Configuration.GameConfig.MaxY
member.summary: Gets the maximum Y dimension of the world.

member.name: P:GameFramework.Configuration.GameConfig.Level
member.summary: Gets the selected difficulty level.

member.name: M:GameFramework.Configuration.GameConfig.Load(System.String)
member.summary: Loads configuration from the specified XML file. Falls back to default values if the file is missing or malformed.
member.param: Path to the XML configuration file.

member.name: M:GameFramework.Configuration.GameConfig.Save(System.String)
member.summary: Saves the current configuration to an XML file.

member.name: T:GameFramework.Creatures.Creature
member.summary:
Abstract base class for all creatures in the game world.
Implements the Template Method, Observer and Strategy design patterns. Concrete creatures must inherit from this class and override at least to set starting health.

member.name: M:GameFramework.Creatures.Creature.#ctor(System.String,GameFramework.Strategies.IHitStrategy,System.Double)
member.summary: Initialises a creature with a name, optional hit strategy and max carry weight.
member.param: The strategy used to calculate outgoing damage. Defaults to if null.
Maximum total weight of attack items the creature can carry. Set to for unlimited.

member.name: P:GameFramework.Creatures.Creature.Name
member.summary: Gets the creature's display name.

member.name: P:GameFramework.Creatures.Creature.HitPoints
member.summary: Gets or sets the current hit-points. Death occurs when this reaches ≤ 0.

member.name: P:GameFramework.Creatures.Creature.IsAlive
member.summary: Gets whether the creature is still alive.

member.name: P:GameFramework.Creatures.Creature.Position
member.summary: Gets or sets the creature's position in the world.

member.name: P:GameFramework.Creatures.Creature.MaxCarryWeight
member.summary: Gets the maximum total weight of attack items this creature can carry.

member.name: P:GameFramework.Creatures.Creature.CurrentCarryWeight
member.summary: Gets the current total weight of all equipped attack items.

member.name: P:GameFramework.Creatures.Creature.AttackItems
member.summary: Read-only view of the creature's attack items.

member.name: P:GameFramework.Creatures.Creature.DefenceItems
member.summary: Read-only view of the creature's defence items.

member.name: M:GameFramework.Creatures.Creature.GetBaseHitPoints
member.summary: Returns the starting hit-points for this creature type. Override in subclasses to set species-specific health.

member.name: M:GameFramework.Creatures.Creature.OnBeforeHit(GameFramework.Creatures.Creature)
member.summary: Hook called before the creature deals damage. Override to add pre-attack logic.

member.name: M:GameFramework.Creatures.Creature.OnAfterHit(GameFramework.Creatures.Creature,System.Int32)
member.summary: Hook called after the creature deals damage. Override to add post-attack logic.

member.name: M:GameFramework.Creatures.Creature.OnDying
member.summary: Hook called when this creature dies. Override for death animations / drops.

member.name: M:GameFramework.Creatures.Creature.SetHitStrategy(GameFramework.Strategies.IHitStrategy)
member.summary: Replaces the active hit strategy at runtime.

member.name: M:GameFramework.Creatures.Creature.AddObserver(GameFramework.Creatures.ICreatureObserver)
member.summary: Registers an observer to receive creature events.

member.name: M:GameFramework.Creatures.Creature.RemoveObserver(GameFramework.Creatures.ICreatureObserver)
member.summary: Removes a previously registered observer.

member.name: M:GameFramework.Creatures.Creature.Hit(GameFramework.Creatures.Creature)
member.summary:
Attacks the creature. The damage is computed via the active .
Template steps: OnBeforeHit → strategy → target.ReceiveHit → OnAfterHit.
member.returns: The raw damage value before the target's defence reduction.

member.name: M:GameFramework.Creatures.Creature.ReceiveHit(System.Int32)
member.summary: Receives an incoming hit, reduces it by equipped defence items, applies the remainder to and notifies observers.

member.name: M:GameFramework.Creatures.Creature.Loot(GameFramework.WorldObjects.WorldObject)
member.summary: Picks up (loots) a from the world. Attack / defence items are added if carry-weight allows.

member.name: M:GameFramework.Creatures.Creature.AddAttackItem(GameFramework.Items.IAttackItem)
member.summary: Adds an attack item to the creature's inventory if it fits within .
member.returns: true if the item was added; false if overweight.

member.name: M:GameFramework.Creatures.Creature.AddDefenceItem(GameFramework.Items.IDefenceItem)
member.summary: Adds a defence item to the creature's inventory.

member.name: T:GameFramework.Creatures.ICreatureObserver
member.summary: Observer interface for creature lifecycle events. Register instances via .

member.name: M:GameFramework.Creatures.ICreatureObserver.OnHit(GameFramework.Creatures.Creature,System.Int32)
member.summary: Called every time the observed creature receives a hit.
member.param: The final damage that was applied (after defence reduction).

member.name: M:GameFramework.Creatures.ICreatureObserver.OnDeath(GameFramework.Creatures.Creature)
member.summary: Called once when the observed creature's hit-points reach zero or below.

member.name: T:GameFramework.Items.AttackItemDecorator
member.summary: Abstract base decorator for . Subclass this to add boosting or weakening effects without modifying the original item (Open/Closed Principle).

member.name: F:GameFramework.Items.AttackItemDecorator._inner
member.summary: The wrapped attack item.

member.name: M:GameFramework.Items.AttackItemDecorator.#ctor(GameFramework.Items.IAttackItem)
member.summary: Initialises the decorator with an inner item to wrap.

member.name: T:GameFramework.Items.BoostedAttackDecorator
member.summary: Decorator that boosts the hit damage of an attack item by a multiplier.

example.code: IAttackItem sword = new AttackItem("Sword", 10, 1); IAttackItem enchanted = new BoostedAttackDecorator(sword, 1.5); // +50% damage

member.name: M:GameFramework.Items.BoostedAttackDecorator.#ctor(GameFramework.Items.IAttackItem,System.Double)
member.summary: Initialises a boost decorator.

member.name: T:GameFramework.Items.WeakenedAttackDecorator
member.summary: Decorator that weakens the hit damage of an attack item (e.g. cursed weapon).

member.name: M:GameFramework.Items.WeakenedAttackDecorator.#ctor(GameFramework.Items.IAttackItem,System.Double)
member.summary: Initialises a weakening decorator.
member.param: Reduction factor between 0 and 1 (e.g. 0.5 = half damage).

member.name: T:GameFramework.Items.CompositeAttackItem
P:GameFramework.Items.CompositeAttackItem.Hit
member.summary: Returns the total hit damage (sum of all children).

member.name: P:GameFramework.Items.CompositeAttackItem.Range
member.summary: Returns the maximum range across all children.

member.name: P:GameFramework.Items.CompositeAttackItem.Weight
member.summary: Returns the total weight (sum of all children). Used to validate a creature's .

member.name: P:GameFramework.Items.CompositeAttackItem.Count
member.summary: Gets the number of items in this composite.

member.name: M:GameFramework.Items.CompositeAttackItem.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Creates a new composite with the given display name.
member.param: Display name for the group (e.g. "Battle Kit").

member.name: M:GameFramework.Items.CompositeAttackItem.Add(GameFramework.Items.IAttackItem)
member.summary: Adds an attack item to the composite.

member.name: M:GameFramework.Items.CompositeAttackItem.Remove(GameFramework.Items.IAttackItem)
member.summary: Removes an attack item from the composite.
member.returns: true if the item was found and removed.

member.name: T:GameFramework.Items.IAttackItem
member.summary: Defines the contract for all attack items a creature can carry.

member.name: P:GameFramework.Items.IAttackItem.Name
member.summary: Gets the display name of the item.

member.name: P:GameFramework.Items.IAttackItem.Hit
member.summary: Gets the base hit-point damage this item deals.

member.name: P:GameFramework.Items.IAttackItem.Range
member.summary: Gets the effective attack range (in world cells).

member.name: P:GameFramework.Items.IAttackItem.Weight
member.summary: Gets the weight of the item (affects carry capacity).

member.name: T:GameFramework.Items.IDefenceItem
member.summary: Defines the contract for all defence items a creature can equip.

member.name: P:GameFramework.Items.IDefenceItem.Name
member.summary: Gets the display name of the item.

member.name: P:GameFramework.Items.IDefenceItem.ReduceHitPoint
member.summary: Gets the number of hit-points reduced when receiving a blow.

member.name: T:GameFramework.Items.AttackItem
member.summary: A concrete attack item such as a sword, axe, bow or magic spell. Operator + is overloaded to combine two items into a .

member.name: M:GameFramework.Items.AttackItem.#ctor(System.String,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Double)
member.summary: Initialises a new .

member.name: M:GameFramework.Items.AttackItem.op_Addition(GameFramework.Items.AttackItem,GameFramework.Items.AttackItem)
member.summary: Combines two instances into a .
member.returns: A composite that sums the damage of both items.

member.name: T:GameFramework.Items.DefenceItem
member.summary: A concrete defence item such as a shield, helmet, boots or armour.

member.name: M:GameFramework.Items.DefenceItem.#ctor(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Initialises a new .
member.param: Number of hit-points absorbed per incoming blow.

member.name: T:GameFramework.Logging.MyLogger
member.summary: Singleton logger that wraps . Supports adding and removing instances at runtime. All framework classes must use this instead of Console.WriteLine.

member.name: P:GameFramework.Logging.MyLogger.Instance
member.summary: Gets the single instance.

member.name: M:GameFramework.Logging.MyLogger.AddListener(System.Diagnostics.TraceListener)
member.summary: Adds a to the logging pipeline.

member.name: M:GameFramework.Logging.MyLogger.RemoveListener(System.Diagnostics.TraceListener)
member.summary: Removes a from the logging pipeline.

member.name: M:GameFramework.Logging.MyLogger.ClearListeners
member.summary: Removes all registered instances.

member.name: M:GameFramework.Logging.MyLogger.Log(System.String)
member.summary: Logs an informational message.

member.name: M:GameFramework.Logging.MyLogger.Warn(System.String)
member.summary: Logs a warning message.

member.name: M:GameFramework.Logging.MyLogger.Error(System.String)
member.summary: Logs an error message.

member.name: T:GameFramework.Strategies.IHitStrategy
member.summary: Strategy interface for computing the total hit damage a creature delivers.

member.name: M:GameFramework.Strategies.IHitStrategy.CalculateHit(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{GameFramework.Items.IAttackItem})
member.summary: Calculates the hit damage from a collection of attack items.

member.name: T:GameFramework.Strategies.SumHitStrategy
member.summary: Default strategy: sums the of all carried items.

member.name: T:GameFramework.Strategies.AggressiveHitStrategy
member.summary: Aggressive strategy: sums all items but adds a fixed bonus.

member.name: M:GameFramework.Strategies.AggressiveHitStrategy.#ctor(System.Int32)
member.summary: Creates an aggressive strategy with the given damage bonus.
member.param: Extra hit-points added on top of normal damage.

member.name: T:GameFramework.Strategies.RandomHitStrategy
member.summary: Random strategy: each item's damage is multiplied by a random factor [0.5, 1.5].

member.name: T:GameFramework.World.World
member.summary: Represents the 2D game world. Holds all and instances and enforces boundary rules.

member.name: M:GameFramework.World.World.#ctor(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Initialises the world with the given dimensions.

member.name: P:GameFramework.World.World.MaxX
member.summary: Gets the maximum X boundary of the world.

member.name: P:GameFramework.World.World.MaxY
member.summary: Gets the maximum Y boundary of the world.

member.name: P:GameFramework.World.World.Creatures
member.summary: Read-only view of all creatures currently in the world.

member.name: P:GameFramework.World.World.WorldObjects
member.summary: Read-only view of all world objects currently in the world.

member.name: M:GameFramework.World.World.AddCreature(GameFramework.Creatures.Creature)
member.summary: Adds a creature to the world at its current position.
member.exception: Thrown if the position is out of bounds.

member.name: M:GameFramework.World.World.RemoveCreature(GameFramework.Creatures.Creature)
member.summary: Removes a creature from the world (e.g. after death).

member.name: M:GameFramework.World.World.AddWorldObject(GameFramework.WorldObjects.WorldObject)
member.summary: Places a world object into the world.

member.name: M:GameFramework.World.World.CleanupRemovedObjects
member.summary: Removes all world objects that have been marked as removed.

member.name: M:GameFramework.World.World.GetCreatureAt(GameFramework.World.Position)
member.summary: Returns the creature at the given position, or null.

member.name: M:GameFramework.World.World.GetObjectsAt(GameFramework.World.Position)
member.summary: Returns all world objects at the given position.

member.name: M:GameFramework.World.World.IsInBounds(GameFramework.World.Position)
member.summary: Checks whether a position is within bounds.

member.name: T:GameFramework.World.Position
member.summary: Represents an (X, Y) coordinate in the 2D world grid.

member.name: P:GameFramework.World.Position.X
member.summary: Gets the X coordinate.

member.name: P:GameFramework.World.Position.Y
member.summary: Gets the Y coordinate.

member.name: M:GameFramework.World.Position.#ctor(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Initialises a new position.

member.name: M:GameFramework.World.Position.Translate(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns a new position offset by (dx, dy).

member.name: M:GameFramework.World.Position.op_Equality(GameFramework.World.Position,GameFramework.World.Position)
member.summary: Equality operator for two positions.

member.name: M:GameFramework.World.Position.op_Inequality(GameFramework.World.Position,GameFramework.World.Position)
member.summary: Inequality operator for two positions.

member.name: T:GameFramework.WorldObjects.WorldObject
member.summary: Base class for all fixed or removable objects placed in the game world, such as walls, treasure chests or potions.

member.name: P:GameFramework.WorldObjects.WorldObject.Name
member.summary: Gets the display name of this world object.

member.name: P:GameFramework.WorldObjects.WorldObject.Position
member.summary: Gets the current world position of this object.

member.name: P:GameFramework.WorldObjects.WorldObject.Lootable
member.summary: Gets whether creatures can loot items from this object.

member.name: P:GameFramework.WorldObjects.WorldObject.Removable
member.summary: Gets whether this object can be removed from the world once looted.

member.name: P:GameFramework.WorldObjects.WorldObject.IsRemoved
member.summary: Gets whether the object has been removed from the world.

member.name: M:GameFramework.WorldObjects.WorldObject.#ctor(System.String,GameFramework.World.Position,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Initialises a world object at the given position.
member.param: Whether the object can be looted.
Whether the object disappears after being looted.

member.name: M:GameFramework.WorldObjects.WorldObject.GetLootableItems
member.summary: Returns the items available for looting (attack and defence items).

member.name: M:GameFramework.WorldObjects.WorldObject.AddLootItem(System.Object)
member.summary: Adds an item to this object's loot pool.

member.name: M:GameFramework.WorldObjects.WorldObject.Remove
member.summary: Marks this object as removed from the world.

member.name: T:GameFramework.WorldObjects.TreasureChest
member.summary: A treasure chest that can be looted for items.

member.name: M:GameFramework.WorldObjects.TreasureChest.#ctor(System.String,GameFramework.World.Position)
member.summary: Creates a treasure chest at the given position.

member.name: T:GameFramework.WorldObjects.Wall
member.summary: An impassable wall block.

member.name: M:GameFramework.WorldObjects.Wall.#ctor(System.String,GameFramework.World.Position)
member.summary: Creates a wall at the given position.

member.name: T:GameFramework.WorldObjects.BonusBox
member.summary: A bonus box that grants items when looted, then disappears.

member.name: M:GameFramework.WorldObjects.BonusBox.#ctor(System.String,GameFramework.World.Position)
member.summary: Creates a bonus box at the given position.
